name: anticipating-shadow-points
description: ASP (Ant-Shadow-Point) — gold-standard planning protocol for non-trivial engineering tasks. 13 phases: research, Klein pre-mortem + Berkeley MAST 14-mode shadow-point detection, independent validator subagent, contractual micro-TODO, claude -p /goal subprocess execution kernel, deliverables sign-off, memory write-back. 12 Iron Laws (including Iron Law 11: never trust $? from claude -p, parse JSON).
